name: @iron-software/design-system
description: Iron Software Design System — tokens, Tailwind theme and Astro components
//: No "type": "module" on purpose — tailwind.config.js is CommonJS and the checker loads it with require(). The checker itself is .mjs, so it is ESM regardless.

scripts.check:vars: tailwindcss -i tailwind/theme.css -o node_modules/.tmp/theme.compiled.css && node scripts/check-component-vars.mjs node_modules/.tmp/theme.compiled.css
scripts.check: npm run check:theme && npm run check:tokens && npm run check:vars
